pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh which cleans up any pre-existing 'deployment-log' channel.
Task description explicitly requires a public channel, not private.
Task description and setup_rocket_chat.sh which synthetically creates the user 'agent.user'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a Rocket.Chat environment where a synthetic user 'agent.user' has been seeded. The agent must create a new public channel exactly named 'deployment-log' and successfully invite 'agent.user' to become a member of it. The verifier uses an external VLM evaluator to score the UI interaction.
